content.en:
Although Taihao's immeasurable body is extremely powerful, it is not easy to achieve initial training.

And the initial cultivation of Taihao's immeasurable body requires a large amount of Hailou Tianjin, as well as different golden sands, before Taihao immeasurable body can be cultivated to the entry stage.

In addition to Hailou Tianjin and Yijinsha, a variety of precious materials are also needed, and the quantity of some materials is not much in Ye Tian, although substitutes can be used, but they also need to be purchased in large quantities.

So, Ye Tian spent some time copying other bodies to trade with chambers of commerce, and finally gathered enough resources to cultivate Taihao's immeasurable body to the entry stage in a short period of time.

"Then copy the body when you haven't started to cultivate the Infinite Body, and cultivate the Taihao Infinite Body!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

This is equivalent to rebuilding, other Great Ancestors can't do it at all, but Ye Tian can easily do it.

Rumble!!!!!

A large amount of materials were devoured by Ye Tian's body, turning into streams of energy and refining his whole body according to Taihao's immeasurable cultivation method.

Originally, with his cultivation of copying his body, many materials could not be refined, or even could not be sustained, but under the cultivation and absorption of Taihao's immeasurable body, these resource materials could only be refined by him.

Time flies, and after a long time, Ye Tian finally preliminarily cultivated Taihao's immeasurable body and entered the entry stage.

After that, he began to rebuild the body and reforge his life.

Previously, the number of times he had reforged his life was twelve, but this time he broke the shackles and carried out thirteen life reforges, and his foundation potential was far greater than before.

Due to the lack of resources, Ye Tian quickly re-entered the high-level immeasurable lifeform, and then quickly condensed the flesh and blood body, as well as the immeasurable bone, and stepped into the second stage of the high-level immeasurable lifeform.

Subsequently, Ye Tian found that after cultivating Taihao's immeasurable body, it was easier for him to carry out the immeasurable bone limit quenching, and the resources he spent were less.

Even if the immeasurable bones condensed now are not as good as before, their combat effectiveness is even stronger.

......

The sixth floor of the Ruins Stone Tower.

The three hundred and eighty-eighth stone steps, Ye Tian had already walked here at this moment, but the Blood Ancestor and the Star Sea Great Ancestor had already reached the four hundredth floor.

In terms of the speed of progress, he is only better than the Blood Ancestors.

After all, when it comes to refining the immeasurable will, his copy body has no advantage.

However, he was not in a hurry, after all, he had been practicing here like this, and he could walk to the six hundredth stone steps sooner or later.

At that time, he will be eligible to enter the seventh floor of the Ruined Stone Tower.

However.

Some of the big names in the Genki Realm were also discussing the situation of the Ruined Stone Tower.

Genki Pavilion.

Six high-level immeasurable beings in the fourth stage are deliberating.

"The ruins stone tower was born, what should we do with it?"

"Naturally, find a way to occupy the ruins stone tower. In terms of grade, the ruins of the stone tower are not much worse than the Xuanqi Mountain of our Xuanqi Pavilion. And after a big war in the past, Xuanqi Mountain was also hit hard, and now it is not as good as the ruins of the stone tower. If you occupy the Relic Stone Tower, you can transform it into our new headquarters!"

"The Ruined Stone Tower is currently in the Ruins Protection Period, and it will threaten the existence of the Ruined Stone Tower, and it will not be able to enter the Ruined Stone Tower at all. We, the fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms, can't enter it even if we want to. As for forcibly breaking the Relic Stone Tower and occupying its origin, ordinary fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms can't do it. We in Xuanqi Pavilion only have one fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform, that is, the Great Pavilion Master, but we have been looking for a breakthrough opportunity for a long time ago, and we can't contact them at the moment. "

"Even if the Great Pavilion Master of our Xuanqi Pavilion is still there, forcibly breaking the Ruined Stone Tower will also bring heavy damage to the Ruined Stone Tower, so it will be meaningless!"

"Send more third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms in, according to what we know, once we enter the ninth layer, there is hope to refine the ruin stone tower. Therefore, let them enter the ninth layer at all costs!"

Not only Genki Pavilion, but many forces are also talking about the same topic.

Obviously, the major forces in the Xuanqi Territory still attach great importance to the Ruined Stone Tower.

Another period of time has passed.

At this time, the ruins stone tower was completely stabilized, and it also opened up the passage of the Shenjia Realm, completely connecting the Xuanqi Realm and the Shenjia Realm.

Of course, the great ancestors of the Xuanqi Realm can't enter the Divine Armor Realm, and the Great Ancestors of the Divine Armor Realm can't enter the Xuanqi Zero Realm, unless they occupy the ruins stone tower and get permission, they can enter and exit freely.

this day.

A high-level immeasurable lifeform in the Divine Armor Realm entered the Ruins Stone Tower, starting from the first layer and slowly entering the second and third layers.

However, the strength of the Divine Armor Realm is really a bit weaker than that of the Xuanqi Realm, and there are not many high-level immeasurable lifeforms in the third stage.

After all, there are only one or two high-level immeasurable lifeforms in the fourth stage of the entire Xuanqi Realm, and the overall strength is too weak and the resources are also scarce, so it is impossible to give birth to the third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms that are too demonic.

As a result, most of the high-level immeasurable lifeforms of the Divine Armor Realm were eliminated in the first layer, and only a few high-level immeasurable lifeforms could enter the third layer.

But in the end, there were still high-level immeasurable lifeforms in the Divine Armor Realm that entered the sixth layer.

......

Airplanes!

A high-level immeasurable lifeform wearing golden defensive armor stepped into the sixth layer, attracting the attention of many Great Ancestors.

"Defensive armor formed by the Golden God Armor Stone!"

The Great Ancestors were secretly surprised.

"It's him, Xuanyun Great Ancestor!"

The Blood Ancestor and the Star Sea Ancestor recognized this high-level immeasurable lifeform, which was the third-stage high-level lifeform ranked first in the Divine Armor Realm.

Its true strength is naturally inferior to the Great Ancestor of the Star Sea, but it has a defensive armor formed by the Golden God Armor Stone, which is dozens of times more powerful than the defensive armor formed by the Black God Armor.

Even if a group of top-notch third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms besieged Xuanyun Great Ancestor, they would not be able to kill them.

In the third stage of the high-level immeasurable lifeform stage, no one could kill the Xuanyun Great Ancestor.

Relying on the defensive armor formed by the golden body armor stone, coupled with his own strength being strong enough, in every intersection period, Xuanyun Great Ancestor snatched a lot of resources from the Nine Shadows Blood Abyss and went back.

And the Xinghai Great Ancestor and the Xuanyun Great Ancestor have fought I don't know how many times, and the Raccoon Blood Great Ancestor before it was not sealed has also fought against the Xuanyun Great Ancestor who has not yet grown up.

Therefore, they are quite familiar with each other.
